summary: Focused on maintaining a Telegram n8n integration fork, developing a Windows file tagging utility, and building custom GitHub profile cards with a CV timeline generator. Also started a lightweight YOLO labeling tool and iterated on a personal Neovim configuration.

items.title: GitHub profile customisation and CV timeline builder
items.description: Iterated on generating profile cards and an LLM-driven CV timeline for the personal GitHub profile.

items.title: Profile card generator workflow
items.description: Refined the custom profile card generator, adding scheduling, a combined SVG, and theme adaptation.

items.title: Clash.Meta proxy fork maintenance
items.description: Worked on exposing APIs for proxy list management in the FlClash fork of Mihomo.

items.title: Telegram n8n node integration fork maintenance
items.description: Continuously improved the n8n TelePilot2 node fork, focusing on authentication reliability and deployment pipeline stability.

items.title: Windows Explorer file-tagging tool release preparations
items.description: Polished documentation and added a changelog in preparation for a new release of the file-tagging utility.

items.title: Neovim development environment maintenance
items.description: Updated personal Neovim configuration for newer APIs, improved remote session support, and added a pre-commit hook.

items.title: GitHub profile update
items.description: Made a minor refresh to the personal GitHub profile README.

items.title: Lightweight YOLO image labeler creation
items.description: Started building a minimal, fast on-host labeling tool for personal machine learning projects.

items.title: Telegram n8n node fork session and auth fixes
items.description: Addressed session storage paths and restored required authentication parameters in the TelePilot2 fork.

items.title: Released v2.0 of Windows file-tagging utility
items.description: Added metadata property support and prepared a Microsoft Store submission for the Explorer tagging tool.

items.title: Started TelePilot2 fork with Docker support
items.description: Launched the n8n TelePilot node fork, adding containerized deployment and early authentication work.

items.title: GitHub profile update
items.description: Performed a small update to the personal GitHub profile README.

items.title: Early Windows file-tagging utility development
items.description: Worked on a Windows Explorer extension for assigning tags to files, focusing on CLI and basic functionality.

items.title: GitHub profile updates
items.description: Made occasional adjustments to the personal README profile.
